page_content:
CHIN302 Advanced Chinese II (3 Credits)

Continuation of CHIN301.

Prerequisite: CHIN301; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department. And must have taken a placement interview offered by the department for Non-majors.

CHIN305 Life in China through TV Plays | (3 Credits)

Using authentic Chinese language material in short TV plays to learn about society and life in China.

Prerequisite: CHIN203 and CHIN204; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.
